---
title: "Redwood Road to Temescal"
---


<a href="https://www.strava.com/activities/18234048917" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-strava"></i> Example Strava effort
</a>

```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2958.33">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>24.55</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2958.33 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>13.38</td>
      <td>55.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.40</td>
      <td>18.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.24</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.94</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.34</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.25</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,201</td>
      <td>7.6</td>
      <td>77 ± 35</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Estudillo Avenue: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Lake Chabot Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>138</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Lake Chabot Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>55</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Walnut Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>83</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Walnut Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>130</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>43</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>110</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>556</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>19 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>53</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>58</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>27</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>71</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>202</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>324</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>12 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>48</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Leimert Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>62</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Saint James Drive: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>40</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Linda Avenue: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,201</td>
      <td>24.2</td>
      <td>167 ± 61</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Estudillo Avenue: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>38</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Lake Chabot Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>138</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Lake Chabot Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>55</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.9</td>
      <td>17</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Walnut Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>83</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Walnut Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>130</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>43</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>110</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>556</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>19 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>53</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>58</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>27</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>71</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>202</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>67</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Redwood Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>324</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>12 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Skyline Boulevard: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>48</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Leimert Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>62</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Saint James Drive: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>40</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Linda Avenue: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>13.2</td>
      <td>53.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>21.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>6.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>3.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
